title: Customize Column Order in Split View on Chart Widget
excerpt:
We would like the ability to reorder and customize the table columns when we are looking at a chart widget in a dashboard view on a portfolio. 
Currently the order isn’t logical and we cannot customize it per chart widge…

posts.author: ccyrier (Christine)
posts.cookedHtml:
We would like the ability to reorder and customize the table columns when we are looking at a chart widget in a dashboard view on a portfolio.
Currently the order isn’t logical and we cannot customize it per chart widget.
